title: 30-40% of Gulf energy infrastructure "destroyed"
author: Rob Beschizza
summary: The U.S. and Israel bombed Iran and assassinated its leaders. Donald Trump declared victory, even as Iran mined the Strait of Hormuz and began a drone strike campaign in response. With all eyes on the Strait and the tanker ships stuck there, news reports haven't captured the scale of the latter effort, which means that there'll be less for the ships to carry for the immediate future. —
